<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Contracts\Service; /** * A ServiceProviderInterface that is also countable and iterable. * * @author Kevin Bond <kevinbond@gmail.com> * * @template-covariant T of mixed * * @extends ServiceProviderInterface<T> * @extends \IteratorAggregate<string, T> */ interface ServiceCollectionInterface extends ServiceProviderInterface, \Countable, \IteratorAggregate { }
